title: "Create an update with this text" explanation
excerpt: Can someone explain what “create an update with this text” action in automations does? I set it and added a message, but I don’t see it anywhere. I expected it to show as an updated conversation, but it didn’t appear the…

posts.author: TempletonFerrari (Joe Public)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can someone explain what “create an update with this text” action in automations does? I set it and added a message, but I don’t see it anywhere. I expected it to show as an updated conversation, but it didn’t appear there.

By the way, is there a way to add a conversation from automation?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: It should be visible in the item card > updates. Click on the item column to popup the item card and check the updates section

posts.author: TempletonFerrari (Joe Public)
posts.cookedHtml: It’s there today. I’m not sure what happened yesterday that it wasn’t appearing (although the automation was running). Thank you for confirming.
